FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["bygningid"]
-- metric_as: "count"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, kartleggingsomradeid, kartleggingsomradenavn, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: spatial_join
-- left_source: 7
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 9: nearest
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 8
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 10: sort
-- source_step: 9
-- order_by: "distance"
-- order_direction: "asc"

1.sql:

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons (national subset by gjentaksintervall=200)

3.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to Drammen municipality extent

4.description: get buildings in Drammen (by kommunenummer) with representasjonspunkt geometry

5.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons (utlosningomr) national subset

6.description: reduce quick-clay hazard polygons to Drammen municipality extent

7.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

8.description: find nearest quick-clay hazard zone for each flooded building and compute distance

9.description: sort buildings by nearest quick-clay distance ascending
